title: LowOrderCheck
summary: Normalizes formal expressions and verifies the encoded raw P2 and P4 low-order identities.

mathematicalContent.heading: Mathematical role
mathematicalContent.body: Normalizes formal expressions and verifies the encoded raw P2 and P4 low-order identities.

mathematicalContent.heading: How to read the translation
mathematicalContent.body: The correspondence below follows Juhlformula/Juhlcombinatorics/LowOrderCheck.lean declaration by declaration. A definition is translated by its defining expression, a theorem by its quantified proposition, and a structure, class, or inductive type by the mathematical data encoded in its fields or constructors. The original Lean signature remains visible beside every translation.

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Normalize a rational literal as syntax.

A small syntax normalizer for low-order raw checks. This only removes syntactic zeros and ones and evaluates rational products. It does not commute, associate, or distribute addition and multiplication.

Expected raw first-order solved jet for the ell = 2 recursion. In explicit terms, its defining expression is Formal Expr.qsmul 1 divided by 4 : ℚ Formal Expr.op D 0 Formal Expr.f plus k Over Two Minus Ell 2 times Formal Expr.tr 0 times Formal Expr.f.

Raw formal P_2, before distributing the scalar -1. In explicit terms, its defining expression is Formal Expr.qsmul -1 Formal Expr.op D 0 Formal Expr.f plus k Over Two Minus Ell 1 times Formal Expr.tr 0 times Formal Expr.f.

Expanded display form of the expected formal P_2. In explicit terms, its defining expression is - Formal Expr.op D 0 Formal Expr.f minus Formal Expr.qsmul 1 divided by 2 : ℚ Formal Expr.k times Formal Expr.tr 0 times Formal Expr.f plus Formal Expr.tr 0 times Formal Expr.f.

Raw formal P_4, keeping D_0 unapplied to products. In explicit terms, its defining expression is Formal Expr.qsmul 4 Formal Expr.qsmul 2 Formal Expr.tr 0 times expected F1 For P4 plus Formal Expr.op D 0 expected F1 For P4 plus Formal Expr.op D 1 Formal Expr.f plus k Over Two Minus Ell 2 times Formal Expr.tr 0 times expected F1 For P4 plus Formal Expr.tr 1 times Formal Expr.f.
formal P 2.normalize equals expected P4 Raw.normalize.

references.locator: Formal Juhl-type formula and OR bridge
references.note: Primary source for the intended curved OR–Juhl identity.
Source for the Juhl side of the formal syntax.

limitations: Verified means that Lean checks the propositions encoded in this file and their imported assumptions. It does not assert that the present formal statement exhausts every analytic hypothesis or convention in the cited literature.
